nasb.text: But the people who followed Omri prevailed over the people who followed Tibni the son of Ginath. And Tibni died and Omri became king.

esv.text: But the people who followed Omri overcame the people who followed Tibni the son of Ginath. So Tibni died, and Omri became king.

cnv.text: 跟從暗利的人勝過了跟從基納的兒子提比尼的人。提比尼死了以後，暗利就作了王。

ccb.text: 两派相争，暗利一派占了上风，提比尼死后，暗利做了王。
